_meta.note: Copy for the new Gelato product types (owner-approved, 2026-06-28). Drops into catalog.json on rebuild. Existing products keep their current copy.

canvas.name: Premium Gallery Canvas
canvas.description: Turn your favourite Canine Keepsakes design into a stunning piece of wall art. Printed on premium stretched canvas with a handcrafted gallery wrap, it's ready to hang straight out of the box and guaranteed to become the talking point of any dog lover's home.
canvas.seoTitle: Custom Dog Canvas Wall Art | Canine Keepsakes
canvas.seoDescription: Bring your favourite Canine Keepsakes artwork to life on a premium gallery-wrapped canvas, ready to hang and built to last.
canvas.why: Your favourite dog deserves wall space.

framed-canvas.name: Premium Framed Canvas
framed-canvas.description: Everything you love about our gallery canvas, finished inside a beautiful wooden floating frame for an even more premium look. Perfect for creating a centrepiece in any room while celebrating your favourite four-legged friend.
framed-canvas.seoTitle: Framed Dog Canvas Print | Canine Keepsakes
framed-canvas.seoDescription: Premium framed canvas featuring your favourite Canine Keepsakes artwork, professionally finished and ready to display.
framed-canvas.why: Gallery-quality artwork without the gallery prices.

poster.name: Premium Art Poster
poster.description: Big personality without the big price tag. Our premium posters are printed on heavyweight paper with rich colours and crisp detail, making every design look fantastic whether it's framed or pinned straight to the wall.
poster.seoDescription: Premium heavyweight dog art posters featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes designs for every dog lover.
poster.why: Affordable artwork that still looks incredible.

framed-poster.name: Premium Framed Poster
framed-poster.description: Your favourite design, professionally framed and ready to hang. A simple way to turn any Canine Keepsakes artwork into a polished feature for your home or office.
framed-poster.seoDescription: Professionally framed dog artwork featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes designs, ready to hang straight away.
framed-poster.why: No hunting for the right frame.

fine-art-print.name: Museum Fine Art Print
fine-art-print.description: Printed on luxurious museum-grade heavyweight paper for exceptional colour, texture and detail. Designed for dog lovers who want something truly special to frame and display.
fine-art-print.seoTitle: Museum Fine Art Dog Print | Canine Keepsakes
fine-art-print.seoDescription: Museum-quality fine art prints featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork on heavyweight archival paper.

acrylic-print.name: Premium Acrylic Wall Art
acrylic-print.description: Brilliant colours meet stunning depth behind crystal-clear acrylic glass. The result is a bold, modern finish that makes every Canine Keepsakes design stand out beautifully.
acrylic-print.seoTitle: Acrylic Dog Wall Art | Canine Keepsakes
acrylic-print.seoDescription: Modern acrylic dog wall art with vibrant colours and exceptional depth, featuring Canine Keepsakes artwork.
acrylic-print.why: A contemporary finish that makes colours pop.

metal-print.name: Modern Metal Print
metal-print.description: Printed directly onto premium aluminium for a sleek contemporary look that's lightweight, durable and packed with vibrant colour. Ideal for modern homes, offices and dog-loving workspaces.
metal-print.seoTitle: Metal Dog Wall Print | Canine Keepsakes
metal-print.seoDescription: Contemporary aluminium wall prints featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork with vibrant colour and lasting quality.

wood-print.name: Natural Wood Print
wood-print.description: Printed directly onto sustainably sourced wood, allowing the natural grain to become part of the artwork. Every piece is completely unique, just like the dog that inspired it.
wood-print.seoTitle: Wood Dog Wall Art | Canine Keepsakes
wood-print.seoDescription: Sustainably printed dog artwork on natural wood, creating unique rustic wall art for dog lovers.
wood-print.why: No two prints are ever identical.

tank-top.name: Premium Tank Top
tank-top.description: Stay cool while showing off your favourite Canine Keepsakes design. Lightweight, comfortable and perfect for sunny walks, holidays, gym sessions or simply spending time with your four-legged best friend.
tank-top.seoTitle: Dog Lover Tank Top | Canine Keepsakes
tank-top.seoDescription: Premium dog lover tank tops featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork. Lightweight, comfortable and perfect for warmer days.
tank-top.why: Perfect for sunny adventures with your best friend.

polo.name: Premium Polo Shirt
polo.description: Smart enough for work, comfortable enough for weekends. Our premium polo lets you wear your favourite Canine Keepsakes artwork with a timeless style that's perfect for any occasion.
polo.seoTitle: Dog Lover Polo Shirt | Canine Keepsakes
polo.seoDescription: Premium embroidered-style polo shirts featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork for everyday wear.
polo.why: A smarter way to show your dog obsession.

kids-tee.name: Kids Premium T-Shirt
kids-tee.description: Made for little dog lovers with big personalities. Soft, durable and comfortable enough for every adventure, featuring the same exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork loved by the whole family.
kids-tee.seoDescription: Premium children's dog t-shirts featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork for young dog lovers.

baby-bodysuit.name: Baby Bodysuit
baby-bodysuit.description: Start them young. Soft, comfortable and made for tiny future dog lovers, our baby bodysuits make the perfect gift for new arrivals and proud dog-loving families.
baby-bodysuit.seoDescription: Soft baby bodysuits featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. A perfect gift for new parents who love dogs.
baby-bodysuit.why: The newest member of the pack.

beanie.name: Premium Beanie
beanie.description: Cold weather is no excuse to leave your favourite design at home. Our premium beanie keeps you warm while celebrating your favourite breed wherever you go.
beanie.seoDescription: Premium beanies featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. Warm, comfortable and perfect for winter walks.

bucket-hat.name: Classic Bucket Hat
bucket-hat.description: A modern classic with plenty of personality. Whether you're at the beach, a festival or walking the dog, this bucket hat lets your favourite artwork come along for the adventure.
bucket-hat.seoTitle: Dog Lover Bucket Hat | Canine Keepsakes
bucket-hat.seoDescription: Classic bucket hats featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork for sunny adventures and everyday wear.
bucket-hat.why: Shade for you. Style for your dog obsession.

dad-hat.name: Classic Dad Hat
dad-hat.description: Relaxed, timeless and effortlessly comfortable. The classic curved peak cap is finished with exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork that's guaranteed to start conversations wherever you wear it.
dad-hat.seoTitle: Dog Lover Dad Hat | Canine Keepsakes
dad-hat.seoDescription: Classic curved peak caps featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. Comfortable everyday style for dog lovers.
dad-hat.why: The everyday cap for everyday dog lovers.

trucker-hat.name: Classic Trucker Cap
trucker-hat.description: Breathable mesh meets classic style. Whether you're travelling, working outdoors or enjoying long walks, this trucker cap keeps you cool while showing off your favourite Canine Keepsakes design.
trucker-hat.seoTitle: Dog Lover Trucker Cap | Canine Keepsakes
trucker-hat.seoDescription: Breathable trucker caps featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. Perfect for sunny days and outdoor adventures.
trucker-hat.why: Made for adventures with muddy paws.

snapback.name: Premium Snapback Cap
snapback.description: Clean lines, bold style and adjustable comfort. A modern snapback that lets you wear your favourite Canine Keepsakes artwork wherever life takes you.
snapback.seoDescription: Premium adjustable snapback caps featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork.
snapback.why: Modern style with a dog-loving twist.

water-bottle.name: Premium Insulated Water Bottle
water-bottle.description: Hydration just got a whole lot more fun. Built to keep drinks colder for longer while proudly displaying your favourite Canine Keepsakes design wherever your adventures take you.
water-bottle.seoTitle: Dog Lover Water Bottle | Canine Keepsakes
water-bottle.seoDescription: Premium insulated water bottles featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. Perfect for walks, work and travel.
water-bottle.why: Every adventure needs water... and dogs.

travel-mug.name: Premium Travel Mug
travel-mug.description: Your morning coffee deserves better than an ordinary mug. Designed for busy dog lovers who never leave home without caffeine and canine company.
travel-mug.seoTitle: Dog Lover Travel Mug | Canine Keepsakes
travel-mug.seoDescription: Premium travel mugs featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork. Perfect for coffee on the go with your dog.
travel-mug.why: Coffee tastes better after the morning walk.

tote-bag.name: Premium Tote Bag
tote-bag.description: Whether it's shopping, work or packing for a day out with your dog, this spacious tote carries everything you need while showing off your favourite Canine Keepsakes artwork.
tote-bag.seoTitle: Dog Lover Tote Bag | Canine Keepsakes
tote-bag.seoDescription: Premium tote bags featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. Stylish, practical and built for everyday life.
tote-bag.why: Because dog owners always carry more than they planned.

apron.name: Premium Apron
apron.description: Protect your clothes while cooking, baking or firing up the barbecue. Finished with exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork that guarantees your kitchen has just as much personality as your dog.
apron.seoDescription: Premium aprons featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. Perfect for cooking, baking and BBQ lovers.
apron.why: Every chef deserves a loyal sous-chef.

phone-case.name: Premium Phone Case
phone-case.description: Take your favourite Canine Keepsakes design everywhere you go. Built to protect your phone while letting your love of dogs shine every time you pick it up.
phone-case.seoTitle: Dog Lover Phone Case | Canine Keepsakes
phone-case.seoDescription: Premium protective phone cases featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork for every dog lover.
phone-case.why: Your best friend belongs in your pocket too.

greeting-card.name: Premium Greeting Card
greeting-card.description: Every occasion is better with dogs. Blank inside for your own message, each premium greeting card comes complete with an envelope and plenty of canine personality.
greeting-card.seoDescription: Premium dog greeting cards featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork. Blank inside and supplied with an envelope.
greeting-card.why: Because every message deserves a wagging tail.

calendar.name: Premium Wall Calendar
calendar.description: Enjoy a full year of exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork month after month. A practical calendar that keeps every day just a little more dog obsessed.
calendar.seoDescription: Premium wall calendars featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork for every month of the year.

notebook.name: Premium Notebook
notebook.description: Perfect for ideas, shopping lists, work notes or your next brilliant dog-inspired project. Finished with exclusive Canine Keepsakes artwork that makes even everyday notes feel special.
notebook.seoDescription: Premium notebooks featuring exclusive Canine Keepsakes dog artwork. Perfect for work, study or everyday notes.
notebook.why: Every great idea starts with a blank page... and a dog.
